name: HyEconomy
description: The first Economy System for Hytale servers is here for free! Using EcoAPI.

name: PingExfiltration
description: Exfiltrate information from a server to another through ICMP (ping) requests.

name: vAnalyzer
description: A Vencord plugin that bundles multiple security and reputation analyzers into Discord, letting you inspect links, invites, files, and profiles
